markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tampa Bay and Houston go to extra innings in the Tampa Bay vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 3:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Tampa Bay vs Houston game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 3:30 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tampa Bay wins the Tampa Bay vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 3:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Tampa Bay vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 3:30 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Tampa Bay vs Houston Winner?
